docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRITISH MOTOR CAR DISTRIBUTORS (JEFFREY QVALE,PRES
